title: Design and manage a crop or pasture nutrition program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design and manage a crop or pasture nutrition program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review, test and analyse site characteristics

pcs.text: Review workplace crop or pasture production plan in consultation with land manager to determine production, economic output and environmental goals for assessment and development of nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review workplace crop or pasture production plan in consultation with land manager to determine production, economic output and environmental goals for assessment and development of nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review workplace crop or pasture production plan in consultation with land manager to determine production, economic output and environmental goals for assessment and development of nutrition program.

pcs.text: Access and review climate, environmental and site data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review climate, environmental and site data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review climate, environmental and site data.

pcs.text: Determine soil, plant and water tests for plant species and climatic conditions according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil, plant and water tests for plant species and climatic conditions according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil, plant and water tests for plant species and climatic conditions according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Develop soil, plant and water testing program that includes visual inspection, sampling, field testing, off-site analysis, task responsibilities, scheduling and desired information outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop soil, plant and water testing program that includes visual inspection, sampling, field testing, off-site analysis, task responsibilities, scheduling and desired information outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop soil, plant and water testing program that includes visual inspection, sampling, field testing, off-site analysis, task responsibilities, scheduling and desired information outcomes.

pcs.text: Implement and monitor a soil, plant and water testing program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and monitor a soil, plant and water testing program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor a soil, plant and water testing program.

pcs.text: Supervise liaison with outside testing agencies and take remedial action where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise liaison with outside testing agencies and take remedial action where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise liaison with outside testing agencies and take remedial action where necessary.

pcs.text: Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soil and plant species by analysing and comparing data against industry accepted standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soil and plant species by analysing and comparing data against industry accepted standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine characteristics, condition and nutritional status of soil and plant species by analysing and comparing data against industry accepted standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review, test and analyse site characteristics

elements.title: Determine plant production system nutrient requirements

pcs.text: Identify plant species nutrition requirements during growing cycle from published data, historical records, current site data, experience and workplace guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant species nutrition requirements during growing cycle from published data, historical records, current site data, experience and workplace guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant species nutrition requirements during growing cycle from published data, historical records, current site data, experience and workplace guidelines.

pcs.text: Identify appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant production according to workplace crop or pasture production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant production according to workplace crop or pasture production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate soil conditions and nutrient availability for plant production according to workplace crop or pasture production plan.

pcs.text: Calculate capital and maintenance nutrient applications using nutrient planning tools
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate capital and maintenance nutrient applications using nutrient planning tools?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate capital and maintenance nutrient applications using nutrient planning tools.

pcs.text: Determine potential seasonal variations requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine potential seasonal variations requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine potential seasonal variations requirements.

pcs.text: Document nutrition program according to analysis of plant production nutrient requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document nutrition program according to analysis of plant production nutrient requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document nutrition program according to analysis of plant production nutrient requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine plant production system nutrient requirements

elements.title: Design a nutrient management plan

pcs.text: Identify criteria for determining and selecting fertiliser and soil amendment products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify criteria for determining and selecting fertiliser and soil amendment products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify criteria for determining and selecting fertiliser and soil amendment products.

pcs.text: Calculate application rates according to soil, plant and water test results, plant requirements, growth stage, manufacturer specifications and workplace crop or pasture production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate application rates according to soil, plant and water test results, plant requirements, growth stage, manufacturer specifications and workplace crop or pasture production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate application rates according to soil, plant and water test results, plant requirements, growth stage, manufacturer specifications and workplace crop or pasture production plan.

pcs.text: Select application methods and timings to ensure effective and efficient product formulation and to minimise loss
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select application methods and timings to ensure effective and efficient product formulation and to minimise loss?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select application methods and timings to ensure effective and efficient product formulation and to minimise loss.

pcs.text: Identify and cost resource requirements for program, and confirm availability of suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost resource requirements for program, and confirm availability of suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost resource requirements for program, and confirm availability of suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Calculate cost-effective unit cost, total costs and estimated returns of soil management and amendment, and provision of plant nutrients
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate cost-effective unit cost, total costs and estimated returns of soil management and amendment, and provision of plant nutrients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate cost-effective unit cost, total costs and estimated returns of soil management and amendment, and provision of plant nutrients.

pcs.text: Identify and apply applicable compliance requirements of legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply applicable compliance requirements of legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply applicable compliance requirements of legislation and regulations.

pcs.text: Identify and assess workplace health and safety, environmental hazards and risks, and environmental and biosecurity impacts of nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess workplace health and safety, environmental hazards and risks, and environmental and biosecurity impacts of nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess workplace health and safety, environmental hazards and risks, and environmental and biosecurity impacts of nutrition program.

pcs.text: Develop and document workplace health and safety and environmental and biosecurity controls to minimise risks, impacts and poor nutrient management practices according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document workplace health and safety and environmental and biosecurity controls to minimise risks, impacts and poor nutrient management practices according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document workplace health and safety and environmental and biosecurity controls to minimise risks, impacts and poor nutrient management practices according to workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Document workplace nutrient management plan according to analysis of nutrient management requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document workplace nutrient management plan according to analysis of nutrient management requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document workplace nutrient management plan according to analysis of nutrient management requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Design a nutrient management plan

elements.title: Monitor and evaluate nutrition program and nutrient management plan

pcs.text: Monitor and evaluate nutrition program and nutrient management plan implementation and results, and produce according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and evaluate nutrition program and nutrient management plan implementation and results, and produce according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and evaluate nutrition program and nutrient management plan implementation and results, and produce according to industry accepted standards and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Review and refine nutrition program in response to changing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and refine nutrition program in response to changing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and refine nutrition program in response to changing conditions.

pcs.text: Identify non-compliance with documented nutrient management plan, and determine remedial actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-compliance with documented nutrient management plan, and determine remedial actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-compliance with documented nutrient management plan, and determine remedial actions.

pcs.text: Document remedial action to improve plant nutrition, and report to relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document remedial action to improve plant nutrition, and report to relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document remedial action to improve plant nutrition, and report to relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Record nutrition program results, and incorporate changes to nutrient management plan and nutrition program for future season application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record nutrition program results, and incorporate changes to nutrient management plan and nutrition program for future season application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record nutrition program results, and incorporate changes to nutrient management plan and nutrition program for future season application.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor and evaluate nutrition program and nutrient management plan
